---
title: "Algernon Charles Swinburne"
---

## Algernon Charles Swinburne

**Dates:** 1837-1909)

### Description

poet

### Biography

He was nephew of Lady Elinor (Ashburnham) Wodehouse, who was a neighbour. It was probably not he, but one of his sisters who was the A. Swinburne who wrote to <i>MP</i> in 1870 in response to an article about their Austrian cousins.  His mother Lady Jane (Ashburnham) Swinburne appears in <i>MP</i> subscription lists, and his cousin Mary (Gordon) Leith was a contributor.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
